2606.29520.title: SAKE: Software Architectural Knowledge Evaluation Benchmark for Large Language Models
2606.29520.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used as assistants across the software development lifecycle, yet their ability to reason about software architecture remains largely unmeasured. Architectural decision-making depends on quality attribute trade-offs, design patterns, and system-level constraints, none of which are exercised by benchmarks that target syntactic or algorithmic tasks. We introduce SAKE (Software Architectural Knowledge Evaluation), a standardized and reproducible benchmark for assessing software architectural knowledge in LLMs. SAKE comprises 2154 expert-curated multiple-choice questions, each with four options, stratified across eight architectural categories and four context-length levels. We evaluate 11 proprietary and open-weight models in zero-shot and five-shot settings. Overall accuracy is high, but performance varies markedly across categories, revealing competency gaps in areas central to professional practice. SAKE, its evaluation scripts, and all results are released as open source to give the community a baseline for tracking architectural reasoning in LLMs.
2606.29520.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地被用作軟體開發生命周期中的助手，但它們在軟體架構推理方面的能力仍然未得到充分測量。架構決策依賴於質量屬性權衡、設計模式和系統級約束，而這些都未在針對語法或算法任務的基準測試中得到體現。我們介紹了SAKE（軟體架構知識評估），這是一個標準化和可重複的基準，用於評估LLMs中的軟體架構知識。SAKE包含2154個由專家策劃的多選題，每題有四個選項，並在八個架構類別和四個上下文長度級別中進行分層。我們在零樣本和五樣本設置中評估了11個專有和開放權重模型。整體準確率很高，但各類別的表現差異顯著，揭示了在專業實踐中核心領域的能力缺口。SAKE、其評估腳本和所有結果都作為開源發布，以便為社群提供一個跟踪LLMs中架構推理的基準。
2606.29520.author: Tiziano Santilli et.al.
2606.29520.authors: Tiziano Santilli, Francesco Daghero, Mayhar Tourchi Moghaddam
